scenes.text:
No storm lasts forever. But the strength
you build during the storm does.

When you are in the middle of chaos, it feels like it will never end. But go back through your life. Every difficult period ended. Every crisis resolved.
Every dark night gave way to morning. This too shall pass. But the lessons, the strength, the character you build right now, those stay with you forever.

Do not just survive the storm. Study it. Find patterns. Build shelter. Prepare for the next one. The
goal is not to avoid storms. It is to become the person who is unshakable when they come.

Tough times do not
last. Tough people do.

What storm are you weathering right now? You
are not alone. Follow for daily strength.
